inputs.label: Mass (m)
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the rotating component (e.g., blade, disk)

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the rotating component (e.g., blade, disk)
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse der rotierenden Komponente (z. B. Schaufel, Scheibe)

inputs.label: Radius (r)
inputs.businessContext: Distance from rotation axis to center of mass

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance from rotation axis to center of mass
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönme ekseninden kütle merkezine olan mesafe
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand von der Rotationsachse zum Massenschwerpunkt

inputs.label: Angular Velocity (ω)
inputs.businessContext: Rotational speed in radians per second (1 rad/s ≈ 9.55 rpm)

businessContext_i18n.en: Rotational speed in radians per second (1 rad/s ≈ 9.55 rpm)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Saniyede radyan cinsinden dönüş hızı (1 rad/s ≈ 9.55 rpm)
businessContext_i18n.de: Drehzahl in Radiant pro Sekunde (1 rad/s ≈ 9,55 U/min)

inputs.label: Cross-sectional Area (A)
inputs.businessContext: Effective cross-sectional area supporting the load

businessContext_i18n.en: Effective cross-sectional area supporting the load
businessContext_i18n.de: Effektive Querschnittsfläche, die die Last trägt

inputs.label: Yield Stress (σ_y)
inputs.businessContext: Material yield strength (e.g., structural steel ~250 MPa)

businessContext_i18n.en: Material yield strength (e.g., structural steel ~250 MPa)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzemenin akma dayanımı (örneğin yapısal çelik ~250 MPa)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
